name: New England Style Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Smoked ham or ham hocks (or 1/2 lb salt pork, cubed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pick over beans.
2. Cover beans with at least three times their volume of water. Bring to a boil for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook another 30 minutes.
3. Cover and let stand for 1 1/2 hours or until beans are tender. Drain the beans.
4. Add 1 cup water to the crock pot with the beans. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours, or on high for 4-5 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Cut the ham from the bone and return it to the pot.
